Off Calendar Feb-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ODASEVA.COM, INC's Motion For Attorney?S Fees And Costs Under Labor Code Section 218.5

Defendant Odaseva.com, Inc.'s unopposed Renewed And Updated Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs Under Labor Code Section 218.5 is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Moving Defendant must prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Off Calendar

Motion For Atty'S Fees And Costs Under Labor Code Sec 218.5
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ODASEVA.COM, INC.'s Motion For Atty'S Fees And Costs Under Labor Code Sec 218.5.

Defendant's motion for attorney fees and costs is stayed pending resolution of plaintiff's promised appeal. (OTO, L.L.C. v. Kho (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 141 [court's inherent power to stay proceedings].) It is this court's practice to address fee/cost issues comprehensibly when litigation is at or near finality, if the parties cannot resolve them.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in copliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
